event: Fever fatigue scleral icterus jaundice dark urine right abdominal and right shoulder pain
Experienced several acute exacerbations of UC
Escalated therapy from aminosalicylates to immunomodulators
Completed a three-dose induction course of infliximab
Treated with IV corticosteroids and another dose of infliximab
Computed tomography (CT) showing multiple multi-loculated abscesses in the right hepatic lobe
Cultures positive for Peptostreptococci skin flora and Escherichia coli
Bacteremic with Streptococcus viridans and then E. coli
Antimicrobial therapy changed from vancomycin and meropenem to ceftriaxone and metronidazole
Repeat CT showing continued improvement in size of the abscesses
Discharged on amino acid-based formula via nasogastric tube and advancing oral diet
Liver loculations improved and resolved on ultrasonography
Normalization of liver enzymes and inflammatory markers
Surgical gross pathology showing moderately to severely active chronic pancreatitis
No evidence of ischemia dysplasia or granulomas
